creator: rabe@uugrn.org
text:
Created attachment 191278
Update for uugrn.org in /head/share/xml/usergroups.xml

Hi *,

I have some information update on Unix Users group Rhein-Neckar e.V. (UUGRN.ORG):
 
- removed some outdated information (locations)
+ changed some URLs to https
+ added link to twitter (user group announces).

See attached patch.

Regards
Raphael Eiselstein, UUGRN e.V.
